overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a red-haired warrior character exploring a tropical beach settlement with wooden tribal architecture, palm trees, and a large beached ship. The character moves from a wooden platform through a sandy settlement area toward a massive wooden vessel on the shore.

companion warrior in red and white armor standing guard

rocky outcrop covered with green vegetation and vines
rocky outcrop with hanging vines and tropical plants
tall wooden totem pole with tribal carvings and red banners

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wooden platform between rocky cliffs where the protagonist stands with two armored companions. The camera slowly orbits the group, showing their detailed tribal armor and weapons, with a tall totem pole visible in the background against a bright tropical sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy coastal path between rocky outcrops

events.description: Aloy begins walking up the sandy path away from the platform, leaving the companions behind

agents.ego_description: walking up a sandy incline between rocky cliffs toward the settlement entrance

tall palm trees lining the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the platform and ascends a sandy trail winding between rocky outcrops. The path opens up as palm trees come into view, and the totem pole shifts to the left as the camera follows Aloy upward toward the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal beach settlement with marketplace and campfires

passing by a central campfire with cooking equipment where NPCs are gathered

warrior sitting by the campfire tending to equipment

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bustling beach settlement with wooden buildings and canvas tents. NPCs stand and sit around campfires as the character walks past, with the massive wooden ship becoming visible on the right side of the frame.

events.description: leaving the dense settlement buildings and approaching the open beach
approaching the massive wooden ship with intricate carved figureheads

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large wooden ship beached on the sand

entered.detail: blue ocean visible beyond the sandy beach
wooden platform leading up to the ship's hull

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the settlement behind and walks across the open beach toward a massive wooden ship with tattered sails and elaborate carvings. The ocean becomes visible in the background as the ship dominates the foreground, revealing intricate tribal details on its hull.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded rocky overlook through a tribal settlement and onto an open beach dominated by a massive shipwreck. It begins on a wooden platform between cliffs, orbiting a group of armored warriors beside a tall totem pole under a bright tropical sky. As the protagonist leaves the platform, the camera follows her up a winding sandy trail through rocky outcrops until the terrain opens up to reveal swaying palm trees. The scene then shifts into a bustling beach settlement filled with wooden buildings, canvas tents, and campfires, with a colossal vessel gradually appearing on the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera moves past the village and across the open sand toward the massive wooden ship, revealing its tattered sails and intricate carvings against the backdrop of the ocean.
